title: lithocarpus kostermansii
intro: Lithocarpus kostermansii, also known as the Kostermans' tanbark oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. The leaves and bark of this plant are used in traditional medicine, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus kostermansii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be found in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and ointments.
